description: A small, dreamlike painting showing a reclining nude female figure with reddish hair emerging from or resting in a large red shell-like form on a turquoise sea. Golden and yellow clouds billow above. The water is rendered in greens and blues with loose, impressionistic strokes. The figure is abstracted and glowing, her body blending into the warm golden tones of the sky. The overall effect is ethereal and visionary.
